'''Outpost D-34''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] checkpoint fixed in orbit around the planet [[Javin]], located in the [[Javin sector/Legends|Javin sector]]. The main station was a [[Bengel Shipbuilders]] [[XQ1 Platform]] carrying both [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] transports. Navigation buoys several kilometers from the platform marked [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] exit points.

==History==
Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], D-34 acted as an intercept point to catch fleeing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Imperial forces worked to pincer Alliance warships into the [[Javin system/Legends|Javin system]] in order to launch ambushes from D-34. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] was transferred to the outpost shortly before the battle and was instrumental in the capture of many Rebels fleeing [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] aboard transport vessels that passed by D-34.

The station and its placement was effective enough to draw the ire of the Alliance and local [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. As the station came under attack Stele defended the platform against a combined force of Rebels and [[Mugaari]] pirates. A shuttle carrying Rebel officers was captured during the skirmish.

D-34 was subsequently captured and plundered by the Alliance and Mugaari while Maarek Stele was interdicting a weapons exchange between the Mugaari and the Rebels. During that he was assigned to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]'' in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]]. Eventually the ''Fogger'' returned to D-34 and the platform was recovered by Imperial forces.
